title: May 24
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|May}}

'''May 24''' is the 144th day of the year (145th in leap years). There are 221 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1920s#1925|1925]] – [[Carmine Infantino]] is born.
*[[1950s#1953|1953]] – [[Alfred Molina]] is born.
*[[1978]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 16|''Star Wars Weekly'' 16]] published.
*[[1986]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 153|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 153]] published.
*[[1994]] – [[Lily Newmark]] is born.
*[[1999]] – ''[[Star Wars Episode I: The Gungan Frontier]]'' released.
*[[2000]] – [[Star Wars (1998) 18|''Star Wars'' (1998) 18]] published.
*[[2007]] – [[Celebration IV]] starts.
*[[2008]] – ''[[Lando Calrissian: Idiot's Array]]'' published in [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]].
*[[2011]] – ''[[Fate of the Jedi: Conviction]]'' published.
*2011 – ''[[The Old Republic: Fatal Alliance]]'' paperback published.
*[[2016]] – [[Star Wars: Episode I — The Phantom Menace (hardcover)|''Star Wars: Episode I — The Phantom Menace'' hardcover]] reprinted by Marvel Comics.
*[[2019]] – [[Star Wars: Episode IX The Rise of Skywalker|''Star Wars'': Episode IX ''The Rise of Skywalker'']] was to be released, but delayed.
*2019 – "[[Chewbacca - Wookiee Warrior]]" airs on YouTube.
*[[2021]] – "[[Star Wars Inside Intel: The Four Sages of Dwartii|''Star Wars'' Inside Intel: The Four Sages of Dwartii]]" published on [[StarWars.com]].
*[[2022]] – ''[[Star Wars Jedi Pocket Expert]]'' published.
*2022 – ''[[Star Wars: The Mini Book of Lightsabers]]'' published.
*2022 – ''[[The High Republic: The Edge of Balance, Vol. 2]]'' published in paperback.
*[[2023]] – [[Darth Vader – Black, White & Red 2|''Darth Vader – Black, White & Red'' 2]] published.
*2023 – [[Hyperspace Stories 5|''Hyperspace Stories'' 5]] published.
*2023 – [[The High Republic (2022) 10|''The High Republic'' (2022) 10]] published.
<noinclude>
